MULTI-INTELLIGENCE RESPONSIVE AI

Meet MYRA,
your desktop's
second mind.

A voice-driven AI assistant that controls your PC, solves IIT-JEE-level math and physics, chats like ChatGPT, and remembers what matters — all running locally on your own machine.

See what it can do
v2.0 · Python · PyQt6 · Windows 10/11
THREE MODES, ONE CORE

Not just a chatbot

MYRA switches between three working modes depending on what you need from it.

MODE 01

🧮 Solver

A dedicated math and physics workspace, from Class 1 basics to IIT-JEE Advanced level.

  • Step-by-step solutions with formulas shown
  • Subject selector — Algebra, Calculus, Mechanics, and more
  • Sessions saved automatically, exportable as text
MODE 02

💬 Chat

A full ChatGPT-style interface for everyday conversation, tools, and documents.

  • Modes for Chat, AI Tools, Documents, and Code
  • Streaming responses as MYRA thinks
  • Recent sessions listed in a side panel
MODE 03

🎙 Voice & Control

Talk to MYRA directly and let it operate your computer on command.

  • Real-time voice conversation
  • Volume, brightness, sleep, lock, shutdown
  • File moves, app launches, web searches — by voice
UNDER THE HOOD

What MYRA actually does

🌤️

Live weather

Local forecast on demand, defaulting to your city.

📂

File management

Move, delete, and organize files by voice or text.

🌐

Web search

Pulls answers from the web without opening a browser tab.

💬

Messaging

Send WhatsApp messages directly from a command.

🎬

YouTube control

Play, pause, and search videos hands-free.

🧠

Persistent memory

Remembers context across sessions, locally.

📊

System monitor

Live view of CPU, RAM, and resource usage.

🇮🇳

India-focused knowledge

Tuned for Indian context — history, culture, current affairs.

SETUP

Two commands to get running

MYRA installs its own dependencies on first run. You'll just need your own free API keys.

  • Free Gemini API key from Google AI Studio
  • Free OpenRouter API key for chat and solver modes
  • Python 3.11 or 3.12, Windows 10/11 recommended
  • A working microphone for voice features
# 1. unzip and enter the folder
$ unzip MYRA-AI.zip && cd MYRA-AI

# 2. install dependencies
$ python setup.py

# 3. launch MYRA
$ python main.py
✓ Setup screen opens — paste your API keys
⚠ keys are stored only in your local config folder

Boss, she's ready.

Download the source, unzip, run setup, and MYRA is online on your machine.

⬇ Download MYRA AI (.zip)
MYRA-AI.zip · ~840 KB · includes README with full setup
Note: this package ships with a blank config/api_keys.json template. Add your own Gemini and OpenRouter keys after install — never share a copy of this folder once your real keys are in it.
FAQ

Before you talk to her

Do I need to pay for anything?+

The app is free. You'll need your own Gemini and OpenRouter API keys — both offer free tiers that cover normal personal use.

Does MYRA work on Mac or Linux?+

It's built and tested for Windows 10/11, since several features (volume, brightness, shutdown control) use Windows-specific libraries. Chat and Solver modes alone could run cross-platform with some adjustment.

Is my API key safe?+

Keys live only in your local config file and are sent directly to Google/OpenRouter when MYRA answers. Nothing routes through a third-party server. Keep your filled-in config file private — don't share or upload it.

What can the system control features actually do?+

Volume, brightness, sleep, lock, and shutdown — plus moving, deleting, or creating files on command. All of it runs locally with the same permissions you already have on your own machine.

Can I turn off the WhatsApp/messaging feature?+

Yes — just leave those fields blank in your config, and skip installing or configuring messaging credentials. MYRA's other modes work fine without it.

MYRA AI — Multi-Intelligence Responsive Assistant · for personal, local use
